---
title: ""
---

# Hello!

## Here, you will find everything about my passion for research

I am an ecophysiologist, interested in how physiology mediates the relationships
between the environment and ecological and evolutionary processes in wild animals.
My research is based on longitudinal data resulting from field observations and 
manipulations.

During my previous experiences, I developed a strong interest towards data analysis
and computational approaches. You will learn more about some personal projects 
exploring such approach on this website.

Currently, I am looking for a postdoctoral position with the aim of investigating
the relationships between proximate and ultimate processes by using mechanistic 
and computational approaches.


Learn more about my work on my [research page](projects.qmd)!

You can also see my [publications](publications.md) or [softwares](software.qmd).
